result.original_description: Creates effective SKILL.md files with proper YAML frontmatter, trigger keywords, and best practices. Use when creating skills, writing skill descriptions, authoring SKILL.md files, or learning skill format.
result.best_description: Creates effective SKILL.md files with proper YAML frontmatter, trigger keywords, and best practices. Use when creating skills, writing skill descriptions, authoring SKILL.md files, or learning skill format.
result.final_description: Use this skill to author, improve, validate, or evaluate Claude Code skills. Invoke it when you need to: write a new SKILL.md from scratch, fix or optimize an existing skill's description so it routes correctly, understand why a skill isn't triggering, interpret validation errors/warnings, design trigger keywords, or run an eval loop to score description quality against test cases. This is the go-to skill for anything in the skill authoring lifecycle — from initial drafting to eval-driven iteration.
